# Pull request

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart analyze` is clean and `dart format .` produces no diff
- [ ] `dart test` passes, with tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] New rules: source guide cited in `sourceGuide` + doc comment, rule
      registered in `RuleRegistry`, passing **and** failing fixtures added,
      README rubric table updated to match
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under an `Unreleased` heading
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
